mapper.sql: s.id, s.emp_id, s.salary_month, s.base_salary, s.position_salary, s.overtime_pay, s.bonus, s.subsidy, s.attendance_deduction, s.social_security, s.tax, s.total_salary, s.actual_salary, s.status, s.create_time
mapper.select: SELECT , e.emp_name, e.emp_no, d.dept_name FROM sys_salary s LEFT JOIN sys_emp e ON s.emp_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON e.dept_id = d.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM sys_salary s WHERE s.emp_id = #{empId} ORDER BY s.salary_month DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_salary SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
